title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, discusses how her AI performance management platform competes against legacy enterprise software giants by building a comprehensive platform from day one rather than a single feature. She shares insights on enterprise sales strategy, the importance of customer trust and brand validation, and hiring philosophy as a competitive advantage.
writeup: This EO interview features Eléonore Crespo, founder of Pigment, an AI performance management platform that integrates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data to support team decisions. The conversation frames how a startup competes against far larger incumbents in enterprise software. Concrete points: Pigment has raised over $400 million, serves customers including Figma, Brex, and Anthropic, and is growing 2x year over year.
